text: How does your body keep itself at the perfect temperature? It's called thermoregulation—a process vital for survival. But it's not just about sweating or shivering. There’s so much more! Your body uses blood flow, hormones, and even behavior to maintain balance. Every choice, from what you wear to when you drink water, impacts this process. And there's still so much we don’t fully understand! Want to dive deeper into the science of your body? Hit follow!
